title: Future of AI
description: The world AI will bring us

scenes.speech: Let's imagine the future world AI will create together!
scenes.title: Future of AI

scenes.speech: AI that can do anything at a human level might be coming!
scenes.title: What is AGI?
scenes.content: Current AI only does specific tasks. AGI can learn anything, like a human. Whether it's achievable is still debated!
scenes.highlight: Now: Narrow AI → Future: AGI → Far future: Superintelligence

scenes.title: AI and the Future of Medicine
scenes.content: AI-powered drug development, personalized treatment, early diagnosis... AI will revolutionize healthcare. Average lifespan of 150 might not be a dream!

scenes.title: AI and the Future of Education
scenes.content: AI teaches each student at their own pace, focusing on their strengths and interests. Focus extra on weak areas, race ahead in strong areas!

scenes.title: AI and the Environment
scenes.content: Climate prediction, renewable energy optimization, resource management... AI is tackling environmental challenges head-on!
scenes.highlight: 🌱 Use AI to stop global warming!

scenes.speech: AI robots active in the physical world!
scenes.title: AI Robots of the Future
scenes.content: From factory automation to home robots to space exploration. The combination of AI and robots will dramatically change human work!
scenes.highlight: 🏭 Factory 🏠 Home 🚀 Space transformed by robots

scenes.speech: The fusion of virtual worlds and AI has begun!
scenes.title: Metaverse and AI
scenes.content: Talking to AI characters in virtual spaces, learning, working. The boundary between reality and virtual is blurring!

scenes.speech: The day AI surpasses human intelligence?
scenes.title: The AI Singularity
scenes.content: The Technological Singularity is the moment AI exceeds human intelligence. Some experts predict around 2045!

scenes.speech: Humans and AI can be the ultimate team!
scenes.title: Coexisting with AI
scenes.content: AI is not humanity's enemy — it's the ultimate partner. Creativity, emotion, and ethical judgment are the human domain. Let's collaborate with AI!

scenes.speech: You've thought deeply about the AI future society!
scenes.title: Lesson Complete!
